reviews.comment:
Si sos socio de ACA tenés descuentos adicionales en combustible. La atención es muy buena pero la estación no presta el servicio de YPF full.

(Translated by Google)
If you're an ACA member, you get additional discounts on fuel. The service is very good, but the station doesn't offer full YPF service.

reviews.comment:

Excellent service from the beach staff...and fast...not too crowded

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Payment can only be made by card or cash. It does not have the YPF club.

reviews.comment:
Muy amplio. Buen lugar para estacionar. Cierran muy temprano. Tienen aire gratis para inflar las ruedas

(Translated by Google)
Very spacious. Good parking. They close very early. They have free air for inflating tires.

reviews.comment:
No sé por qué no hacen factura A si se paga con la app solo en las de ACA

(Translated by Google)
I don't know why they don't issue type A invoices if you pay with the app, only at ACA locations.
